import pandas as pd


def process_partitions(df, groups):
    results = []
    for group in groups:
        mask = df["group"] == group
        subset = df.loc[mask].copy()
        subset["score"] = subset["value"] * 2
        subset["rank"] = subset["score"].rank(ascending=False)
        results.append(subset)
    return pd.concat(results)


def clean_all(df):
    df = df.copy()
    df["name"] = df["name"].str.strip()
    df["email"] = df["email"].str.lower()
    return df
